name: IRC_LC_HISTORY
description: Stores the history tracking data for the process flexibility.

columns.Name: HISTORY_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: STEP_DURATION
columns.Comments: Duration of the step in seconds

columns.Name: EVENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the event type.

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: The unique identifier of associated source object.

columns.Name: SUBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: The instance key of associated source object.

columns.Name: EVENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Date at which the event occurred. Can be different from CREATION_DATE who column value.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the person who triggered the event.

columns.Name: TRACE_LOG
columns.Comments: Lifecycle API internal data for troubleshooting purposes.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the lifecycle process for the event.

columns.Name: PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the phase at the time of the event.

columns.Name: STATE_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the state at the time of the event.

columns.Name: ROUTING_STEP_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the routing step that triggered the event.

columns.Name: ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the action that triggered the event.

columns.Name: REASON_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the selected reason for the event update

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: User entered comments for the event
